revision_summary:
Three targeted fixes required before production:

1. NUMERIC DISCIPLINE VIOLATION (critical): Remove the fabricated annualized figure 'almost two thousand dollars a year going to AEP' from cherry_pick_moments[6] coaching_implication. Replace with an emotion/intent-based alternative that does not invent a quantitative claim. The codex's numeric_discipline rule is explicit: prescriptive alternatives use INTENT and EMOTION as leverage, not numbers. The $165/month figure from the transcript is permissible; the $2,000/year extrapolation is not.

2. CODEX MISCLASSIFICATIONS (two items): (a) cherry_pick_moments[2] — remove bill_anchoring from the codex reference; the tree-trimming/shading concern has no connection to bill anchoring. Replace with analysis_directives.cross_sell_signal_detection as primary reference. (b) cherry_pick_moments[3] — change classification from 'knowledge_gap' to 'scope_creep'; Bucky had the knowledge and chose to share it, which is the opposite of a knowledge gap. Correct codex reference is coaching_philosophy.setter_scope_discipline / analysis_directives.scope_creep_detection.

3. MISSED PROTOCOL MOMENT (significant): Add a cherry_pick_moment for the spouse-on-title protocol gap. Terry confirmed his wife is on the title at 01:06. Bucky never explicitly confirmed she would be on the Monday closer call. The codex's protocols.spouse_decision section treats this as a hard protocol requirement. This is a direct protocol_adherence miss that belongs in cherry_pick_moments and coaching_focus, not only in the handoff_brief.

Secondary (non-blocking but recommended): (a) Correct the bill-collection time-burn framing — the 'over ten minutes' claim conflates the full verify section with the active friction loop (~3.5 minutes). Revise to accurately characterize the friction window as 10:37–14:04. (b) Soften the trajectory_verdict.summary framing ('The call ends warm because Terry is a warm person, not because Bucky created warmth') to acknowledge Bucky's genuine contribution to the rapport exchange. (c) Add the missed church-referral competitive moment (02:22) as a cherry_pick_moment graded against rebuttals.already_saw_design strategy.
